title: 📅 Lecture Interchange: Machine Learning
content:
Dear Students,

Please note that there will be a lecture interchange on Friday, 10 July 2026.

• Dr. Rajesh Kumar's Machine Learning lecture (09:00 AM – 10:30 AM) will be taken by Prof. Swara Mehta.
• Prof. Swara Mehta's Web Development lecture (11:00 AM – 12:30 PM) will be taken by Dr. Rajesh Kumar.

Kindly plan accordingly.
